tagline: The AI-native infrastructure platform. Self-hosted. Bare metal. Smarter than the cloud.
purpose: Full-stack infrastructure platform replacing cloud vendor lock-in with self-hosted, AI-optimized bare metal services

services.email: Transactional and bulk email delivery with AI deliverability optimization
services.deploy: App and container deployment with zero-downtime rolling updates
services.cron: Distributed cron job scheduling with failure prediction and auto-retry
services.dns: Authoritative DNS with AI-assisted record management
services.cdn: Edge caching and static asset delivery
services.storage: S3-compatible object storage on bare metal NVMe
services.tunnel: Secure reverse tunnel and proxy (replaces Cloudflare Tunnel)
services.secrets: Encrypted secrets and environment variable management

gatetest.purpose: Block deploys that fail test gates

competitive_position: Bare metal + AI beats cloud: no per-seat pricing, no vendor lock-in, no black-box infrastructure. Every job Crontech runs makes the next one smarter. The AI learns your traffic patterns, predicts failures before they happen, and optimizes resource allocation continuously. Cloud vendors charge you to run dumb infrastructure. Crontech runs smart infrastructure you own.
